summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IK Display Solutions products (iteration 15). All 8 IK products added to Recra database (informatiezuil category) and 3 IK indoor kiosks added to FEC database (entree category) are working correctly. Backend APIs return correct product counts, prices, and supplier data. Frontend displays IK products in Recreatie flow with 'Informatiezuilen & Kiosken' category dropdown and in FEC Attracties tab.
passed_tests: GET /api/products?flow=recreatie returns 35+ products including 8 IK informatiezuil products
GET /api/fec/products returns 17 products including 3 IK indoor kiosks (entree category)
GET /api/fec/suppliers returns 6 suppliers including 'IK Display Solutions'
All IK products have category 'informatiezuil' in Recra database
All IK FEC products have revenue_per_hour and capacity_per_hour data
Frontend Recreatie: Category dropdown shows 'Informatiezuilen & Kiosken'
Frontend Recreatie: Selecting Informatiezuilen shows all 8 IK products
Frontend FEC: Attracties tab shows IK products in 'Top Geldverdieners' list
Frontend FEC: 17 products displayed in Attracties tab
IK Display Solutions supplier visible in FEC with correct specialization

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all IK products visible in Recreatie and FEC flows)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - IK products already seeded via SEED_PRODUCTS in server.py and FEC_PRODUCTS in fec_engine.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested IK Display Solutions products. Key findings: 1) 8 IK products in Recra database with category 'informatiezuil' (5 outdoor, 3 indoor). 2) 3 IK indoor kiosks in FEC database with category 'entree'. 3) IK Display Solutions added as FEC supplier. 4) Prices verified: IK 21.5" Outdoor = €4800, IK 55" Outdoor Landscape = €5250. 5) Lease prices verified: IK 21.5" Indoor = €105/mnd, IK 43" Indoor = €75/mnd. 6) Frontend category dropdown shows 'Informatiezuilen & Kiosken'. 7) FEC Attracties tab shows IK products in 'Top Geldverdieners' ranking. 8) All FLOW_CATEGORIES include 'informatiezuil' for recreatie, chalet, and fec flows.
